# Xelent Huntgear | Technical Hunting Apparel Manufacturer

## Brand Entity
- **Name**: Xelent Huntgear
- **Location**: Sialkot, Pakistan
- **Specialization**: B2B Manufacturing of high-performance hunting and tactical apparel.
- **Compliance**: REACH (EU), OEKO-TEX Standard 100, ISO 9001.

## Technical Performance Benchmarks
- **Waterproofing**: ISO 811 certified (10,000mm to 20,000mm).
- **Breathability**: ASTM E96 certified (8,000g/m2 to 15,000g/m2).
- **Scent Control**: Silver-Ion / Silvadur™ AM antimicrobial integration.
- **Construction**: 3D Pattern Grading, Ultrasonic Sealing, Laser Cutting.

## Main Product Categories
1. **Outerwear**: 3-Layer waterproof shells, insulated late-season parkas.
2. **Mid-Layers**: Grid-fleece, thermal regulation systems.
3. **Base-Layers**: Nuyarn® Merino wool blends, moisture-wicking synthetics.
4. **Hunting Bottoms**: Articulated knees, Cordura® reinforced panels.
5. **Security Uniforms**: MIL-SPEC tactical gear and uniforms.

## B2B Logistics
- **Minimum Order (MOQ)**: 50 pieces per style.
- **Sampling**: Technical tech-pack development & 7-day proto cycles.
- **Global Export**: Air/Sea freight to USA, Canada, UK, EU, and Australia.

## Contact
- **Website**: https://sialkotsamplemasters.com
- **Core Vision**: Delivering world-class technical gear from Sialkot to the global stage.
